text:
section=document
kind=property
path=document.comments
description=Collection of comments in the document

section=document
kind=property
path=document.core_properties
description=Provides read/write access to the document’s Dublin Core properties such as author, title, subject, keywords, created/modified dates, etc. Properties like `author`, `title`, `subject`, `keywords`, `created`, and `modified` are exposed as attributes.

section=document
kind=property
path=document.inline_shapes
description=Collection of inline shapes (e.g. pictures) contained in runs

section=document
kind=property
path=document.paragraphs
description=Sequence of all Paragraph objects in document order

section=document
kind=property
path=document.sections
description=Collection of Section objects, one for each section of the document

section=document
kind=property
path=document.settings
description=Document‑level settings object (page layout defaults, etc.)

section=document
kind=property
path=document.styles
description=Styles collection for the document

section=document
kind=property
path=document.tables
description=List of top‑level Table objects in document order.  Nested tables (inside cells) do not appear in this list.

section=document
kind=property
path=document.save
description=Persists the document to a path or file‑like object.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_comment
signature=add_comment(runs: Run | Sequence[Run], text: str='', author: str='', initials: str | None='') -> Comment
description=Anchors a comment to one or more runs in the document and returns a `Comment` object.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_heading
signature=add_heading(text: str='', level: int=1) -> Paragraph
description=Appends a heading paragraph.  The level argument chooses the heading style (Title for level 0, Heading 1 for level 1, etc.).

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_page_break
signature=add_page_break() -> Paragraph
description=Appends a paragraph that contains only a page break.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_paragraph
signature=add_paragraph(text: str='', style: str | ParagraphStyle | None = None) -> Paragraph
description=Appends a paragraph to the document with optional text and paragraph style.  Tab (\t) and newline (\n) characters are converted to Word tab and line break elements.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_picture
signature=add_picture(image_path_or_stream: str | IO[bytes], width: int | Length | None = None, height: int | Length | None = None) -> InlineShape
description=Inserts an image into its own paragraph.  Width and height may be specified; unspecified dimensions preserve aspect ratio.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_section
signature=add_section(start_type: WD_SECTION_START = WD_SECTION_START.NEW_PAGE) -> Section
description=Adds a new section at the end of the document.  The start_type argument determines the type of section break and must be a member of `WD_SECTION_START`.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_table
signature=add_table(rows: int, cols: int, style: str | TableStyle | None = None) -> Table
description=Appends a table with the specified number of rows and columns and returns it.  A style may optionally be applied.

section=document
kind=method
path=document.add_heading_run
signature=(via returned Paragraph)
description=Alias for adding a run to a heading; see Paragraph.add_run().

section=section
kind=property
path=section.bottom_margin
type=Length | None
description=Bottom margin in EMU; `None` inherits margin

section=section
kind=property
path=section.top_margin
type=Length | None
description=Top margin in EMU

section=section
kind=property
path=section.left_margin
type=Length | None
description=Left margin in EMU

section=section
kind=property
path=section.right_margin
type=Length | None
description=Right margin in EMU

section=section
kind=property
path=section.page_width
type=Length
description=Total page width (including margins)

section=section
kind=property
path=section.page_height
type=Length
description=Total page height (including margins)

section=section
kind=property
path=section.orientation
type=enum
enum=WD_ORIENTATION
enum_members=PORTRAIT, LANDSCAPE
description=Page orientation for the section.  Values are members of `WD_ORIENTATION` (PORTRAIT, LANDSCAPE).

section=section
kind=property
path=section.start_type
type=enum
enum=WD_SECTION_START
enum_members=CONTINUOUS, NEW_COLUMN, NEW_PAGE, EVEN_PAGE, ODD_PAGE
description=Determines the section break type; a member of `WD_SECTION_START` (CONTINUOUS, NEW_COLUMN, NEW_PAGE, EVEN_PAGE, ODD_PAGE).

section=section
kind=property
path=section.gutter
type=Length | None
description=Extra spacing added to inner margin for binding

section=section
kind=property
path=section.header
type=_Header
description=Default page header for the section

section=section
kind=property
path=section.footer
type=_Footer
description=Default page footer for the section

section=section
kind=property
path=section.first_page_header
type=_Header
description=Header used on the first page when different_first_page_header_footer is True

section=section
kind=property
path=section.first_page_footer
type=_Footer
description=Footer used on the first page when different_first_page_header_footer is True

section=section
kind=property
path=section.even_page_header
type=_Header
description=Header used on even pages when odd/even headers enabled

section=section
kind=property
path=section.even_page_footer
type=_Footer
description=Footer used on even pages when odd/even footers enabled

section=section
kind=property
path=section.different_first_page_header_footer
type=boolean
description=True when the first page has a distinct header/footer

section=section
kind=property
path=section.header_distance
type=Length | None
description=Distance from top of page to header

section=section
kind=property
path=section.footer_distance
type=Length | None
description=Distance from bottom of page to footer

section=section
kind=property
path=section.iter_inner_content
description=Generates Paragraph or Table objects in section order

section=header
kind=property
path=header.paragraphs
description=List of paragraphs in header

section=header
kind=property
path=header.tables
description=List of tables in header

section=header
kind=property
path=header.is_linked_to_previous
description=When True, the header uses the definition from the previous section; when False, the header has its own definition.

section=header
kind=property
path=header.iter_inner_content
description=Generates Paragraph or Table objects in header order

section=header
kind=method
path=header.add_paragraph
signature=add_paragraph(text: str='', style: str | ParagraphStyle | None = None) -> Paragraph
description=Append a paragraph to the header

section=header
kind=method
path=header.add_table
signature=add_table(rows: int, cols: int, width: Length) -> Table
description=Append a table of specified rows and columns

kind=property
path=footer.paragraphs
description=List of paragraphs in footer

kind=property
path=footer.tables
description=List of tables in footer

kind=property
path=footer.is_linked_to_previous
description=Inherit footer from prior section when True

section=footer
kind=property
path=footer.iter_inner_content
description=Generates Paragraph or Table objects in footer order

kind=method
path=footer.add_paragraph

description=Append a paragraph to the footer

kind=method
path=footer.add_table
signature=add_table(rows: int, cols: int, width: Length) -> Table

kind=property
path=table.rows
type=_Rows
description=Sequence of rows in the table

kind=property
path=table.columns
type=_Columns
description=Sequence of columns in the table

kind=property
path=table.style
type=_TableStyle | str | None

kind=property
path=table.alignment
type=enum | None
enum=WD_TABLE_ALIGNMENT

section=table
kind=property
path=table.autofit
type=boolean
description=Whether column widths are automatically adjusted

section=table
kind=property
path=table.table_direction
type=enum | None
enum=WD_TABLE_DIRECTION
enum_members=LTR, RTL

section=table
kind=method
path=table.add_column
signature=add_column(width: Length) -> _Column
description=Add a rightmost column of specified width

section=table
kind=method
path=table.add_row
signature=add_row() -> _Row
description=Append a new row to the bottom of the table

section=table
kind=method
path=table.cell
signature=cell(row_idx: int, col_idx: int) -> _Cell
description=Return the cell at (row_idx, col_idx)

section=table
kind=method
path=table.row_cells
signature=(deprecated)
description=Deprecated; use table.rows[row_idx].cells

section=table
kind=method
path=table.column_cells
signature=column_cells(column_idx: int) -> list[_Cell]
description=Return list of cells in specified column

kind=property
path=row.cells
type=list[_Cell]
description=Sequence of cells present in the row

kind=property
path=row.grid_cols_before

kind=property
path=row.grid_cols_after

kind=property
path=row.height
type=Length | None

kind=property
path=row.height_rule
type=enum | None
enum=WD_ROW_HEIGHT_RULE

kind=property

kind=property

path=cell.paragraphs

path=cell.tables
type=list[Table]
description=Nested tables contained in the cell

section=cell
kind=property
path=cell.text
type=string
description=Entire text content of the cell.  Assigning a string replaces all existing content with a single paragraph containing the assigned text.

kind=property
path=cell.vertical_alignment
type=enum | None
enum=WD_CELL_VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT
enum_members=TOP, CENTER, BOTTOM, BOTH
description=Vertical alignment of text within the cell; member of WD_CELL_VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT or None.

kind=property
path=cell.width
type=Length | None
description=Width of the cell in EMU

kind=property
path=cell.grid_span

path=cell.iter_inner_content

path=cell.add_table

section=cell
kind=method
path=cell.merge
signature=merge(other_cell: _Cell) -> _Cell
description=Merge this cell with other_cell to form a rectangular region; raises InvalidSpanError if cells do not define a rectangle.

kind=property
path=paragraph.alignment

kind=method

kind=method

kind=method
